title: FDA reports new outbreak of explosive diarrhea with 72 cases identified
summary: The FDA said 72 cases have been identified in this outbreak, but the agency provided no details on the situation. Whether the new outbreak the FDA identified Wednesday is ultimately from an entirely different source or linked to that outbreak remains unclear.
